description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the psono-docker.jfrog.io/ubuntu:22.04 Docker image (and for the build-docker-image job a docker:25-dind service with DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375/, DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR='') and defines a single "build" stage; add a build-chrome-extension job (stage build, only branches@esaqa/psono/psono-client and tags matching ^v[0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*$, except schedules) that runs "apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl", "sh ./var/download_translations_from_artifactory.sh", "sh ./var/prep-build.sh", "node var/update_public_suffix_list.js", "npm run buildchrome", "sh ./var/package-chrome-extension.sh", a conditional jfrog upload block, "mv /builds/esaqa/psono/psono-client/build/chrome ../", "rm -Rf *", "rm -Rf .* 2>/dev/null || true", "mv ../chrome/* ./" and stores all files as an artifact named "chrome_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"; add a build-docker-image job (stage build, same only/except) that installs curl, iptables and libdevmapper1.02.1, downloads and verifies Docker .deb packages, installs them, runs "docker info", logs in to the GitLab registry with the CI job token, creates a buildx builder and executes "docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE --push --pull ." using the docker:25-dind service; add a build-electron-linux job (stage build, only develop/master branches and matching tags, except schedules) that runs "apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl rpm", "sh ./var/download_translations_from_artifactory.sh", "sh ./var/prep-build.sh", "npm run buildelectron", creates src/electron/src, copies build output, runs "npm ci" and "npm run build" inside src/electron, moves the dist folder, cleans the workspace and archives all files as an artifact named "electron_linux_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" (expire 1 week); add a build-electron-macos job (stage build, same triggers, runs on a macOS runner) that runs "sh ./var/download_translations_from_artifactory.sh", "npm ci", "npm run buildelectron", prepares the electron source, installs Apple certificates into a temporary keychain using the $APPLE_CERTIFICATE_P12 and $APPLE_CERTIFICATE_P12_PASSWORD variables, runs "npm run build", moves the dist folder, cleans and archives as "electron_macos_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" (expire 1 week); add a build-electron-windows job (stage build, same triggers, runs on a Windows runner) that runs the PowerShell script "\.\var\download_translations_from_artifactory.ps1", "npm ci", "npm run buildelectron", prepares the source, runs "npm ci" and "npm run build", moves the dist folder, cleans and archives as "electron_windows_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" (expire 1 week); add a build-firefox-extension job (stage build, same only/except as chrome) that runs "apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl", "sh ./var/download_translations_from_artifactory.sh", "sh ./var/prep-build.sh", "node var/update_public_suffix_list.js", "npm run buildfirefox", "sh ./var/package-firefox-extension.sh", a conditional jfrog upload block, moves the built extension, cleans and archives as "firefox_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"; add a build-sbom job (stage build, same triggers) that runs "apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl", "sh ./var/prep-build.sh", "npx @cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm > sbom.json", a conditional jfrog upload block, moves the sbom file, cleans and archives as "sbom_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"; finally add a build-webclient job (stage build, same triggers) that runs "apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl", "sh ./var/download_translations_from_artifactory.sh", "sh ./var/prep-build.sh", "npm run buildwebclient", "sh ./var/package-webclient.sh", a conditional jfrog upload block and archives all files as "webclient_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME". All jobs exclude schedules, have no cache defined, and deployment is performed via jfrog CLI uploads to Artifactory and Docker image push to the GitLab Container Registry.
